messages.body: Good morning. We need a larger quantity of KNM Coffee but split across two delivery dates.
Same KNM blend as last order, or different?
Good morning. How many bags in total and how do you want to split?
20 bags total. 12 bags first delivery, 8 bags second. We're restocking two sites.
same product for both btw
1kg bags still, or do you need 500g?
Same address or different for each?
First delivery to 100 Finance Ave, second to 50 Changi Business Park.
or was it 50 Changi North... let me check
yes 50 Changi Business Park
is that the medium roast — we only want that one
$25 per bag, total $500. For 20 bags we can do 5% — $23.75 per bag, total $475.
that's per bag right
That works.
what's shelf life on this batch btw
Preferred dates for each delivery?
end of this month for Finance Ave, march 12 for Changi.
Need any other SKUs or just KNM for now?
Noted. SO will be sent today. Anything else?
No. Thanks.
You're welcome.
